text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm walking through the shopping district
one evening...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer! Your timing couldn't be better!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Could you draw this for me? I've got to get to
work soon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She forcefully jams a slip of paper into the palm
of my hand. I take a closer look and see...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I've got my sights set on the second prize—a
bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: The line is over there! I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction Ines Fujin is pointing and
see a long line of families who have just finished
shopping.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand over the ticket I got from Ines Fujin and
eagerly turn the handle on the raffle device.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! It's actually possible to win the grand
prize?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Share some of that good luck with me, will ya?!
Next time I get a chance, I'll win myself a grand
prize, too!
choice_data_list: Huh, but what about this coupon?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you keep it. You were the one who won it,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't feel right taking it after the fact.
C'mon, hurry up and put it in your pocket.
choice_data_list: But it was your ticket in the first place...
But it was your ticket in the first place...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I said it's fine. Just accept it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Why not?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Just take it already, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh! Wait, I've got an idea! How about this?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep this coupon in reserve for now! Once
we find a time that fits both our schedules, we'll
go. End of story. Sound good?
choice_data_list: I can get on board with that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew... We've finally got that sorted, then.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep it in this room for now. That way you
can use it whenever you feel like it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Geez...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You're such a handful.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Welcome! How many of you are dining toda—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wait, Trainer?! Are you eating ramen again?
choice_data_list: No, no! I wanted to tell you I won first prize!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's a carrot hamburger steak! Is it really
okay for me to have this?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'll eat it after I'm done with my shift!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Say, Trainer. You didn't come all the way over here just to give me this, did you?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You could've just given me it tomorrow. You've
got a surprisingly cute side to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I hand over the deluxe carrot hamburger
steak to Ines Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I receive a cardboard box packed full of carrots,
which I decide to carry to the student dorms. But
when I arrive...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come across Oguri Cap, her stomach loudly
rumbling. With each rumble, she visibly winces—it
seems her hunger has reached its limit.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you hungry, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll share a few with you. I don't have that
many, though, so keep this a secret between us,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but they'd probably be tastier cooked rather
than raw. How about I whip you something up?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So that's why we're being treated to a hot pot,
huh? I was surprised when I suddenly got a
message saying to come to your office after I
finish work.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ines! Your trainer's cooking is so delicious!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My trainer is top-class, after all! Right, I think I'll
try a bit too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the giant box of carrots vanishes in a
single night, disappearing into an abyss made up
of two Umamusume stomachs...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
A single carrot, huh? Well, it is just a raffle, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping out on short notice, anyhow!
That raffle ticket was going to expire after today,
so I'm glad it didn't go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if you ever have a spare ticket of
your own. I'll be there to help you out, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I wonder if that will ever happen...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It totally will!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand over the carrot to Ines Fujin and we head
home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>
choice_data_list: I guess luck wasn't on my side!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hello-lo, Trainer! About that raffle ticket I gave
you yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You're looking a bit down in the dumps first
thing in the morning...
choice_data_list: I pulled a blank in the raffle...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What?! No way?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, no, no. I didn't mean it like that! I just can't
believe you're feeling down because of something
so silly!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aaah, look, I'm sorry, okay? I never expected you
to feel guilty over a raffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up making Ines Fujin worry about me
needlessly.
